subTitle: Game meat in Rajasthan used to be slow-cooked in underground pits by soldiers to ensure that enemy troops did not see any fire.

subTitle: The host sheds light on the scenic Jeju Island located in South Korea, whilst exploring noteworthy spots that the region covets.

subTitle: Asmita Sood visits a few popular and unexplored cities across India. From stunning palaces to ornate stairwells, Asmita finds herself soaking in the romance of Bundi, a charming 14th century town in Rajasthan.
